hypothesis: A market-pullback resilience breakout shadow entry may surface replayable continuation candidates when SPY is in a short pullback but the ticker holds above its recent base and closes at a short-term high, distinct from recent pullback reclaim, inside-day, gap-and-hold, VCP, sector-leadership, and add-on trigger families.
single_causal_variable: market-pullback resilience breakout shadow entry definition
locked_variables: market-pullback resilience breakout shadow entry definition; no production strategy changes
acceptance_rule: observed_only shadow mode; must report candidate count, A/B same-day overlap, 5d/10d/20d forward returns, and scarce-slot proxy before any production replay
